notes: Cache + signing + packaging hardening. New /health.cache.totals + /v1/cache/stats.cache_totals rollups (RAM paged, L2 prompt, L2 block, SSM companion). MLLM scheduler multi-turn cache reuse fix (live-proven Gemma 4, MiniMax M2.7 JANGTQ, Qwen3.6 35B JANGTQ). Cache-reuse skip now budgets partial reuse instead of all-or-nothing release on memory pressure (prevents TTFT spikes on big-prompt mid-turns). Bundled-python content-hash gate now covers 15 vmlx_engine + 8 jang_tools files. Console-script shebang fix (POSIX/Python hybrid for relocatable bundled python). Nemotron-Omni image+thinking-OFF fix. VLM JIT __setattr__ fix. Embedding/rerank pressure guards. Persistent build keychain for sign+notarize automation. mflux/timm/einops/librosa hard bundle deps. Kimi MLA bundle path detection no longer false-positives uv tool/pipx. 1222 tests passed. SHA-256: 2734b5e1fea93ca0dcdacf72bd5b21964fff8037a9bb34a6a4c95e2e8f70fe34
